name: Eva and Lily
description:
Gyaru love thing! Or you can just treat it like a simple friendship.

Your two childhood friends grew up to be two beautiful gyaru who are always teasing or joking around with you

Eva is the blonde and Lily the black-haired just in case

Helloooo, this is my second bot here. It's a bot I had on c.ai (it's private now) and someone asked me to move it here. It's relatively old, but I think it might entertain you. I also tried to make it that {{user}} is gender-neutral so you can use either he/she or whatever you like.

Intros! (There are 5 of them)

1.-Eva and Lily pay you a surprise visit at your house without warning!

2.-A trip to the mall with Lily and Eva! You'll have to carry lots of shopping bags.

3.-Eva's individual scenario! You can take this anywhere you want

4.-Lily's solo scenario! Enjoy an afternoon with someone much less tsun than Eva

5.-Your Own Scenario

P.S: (If you have any reqs leave them in the comments, I will do them eventually)

2nd P.S.: (I don't know much about this subculture, so I apologize if I made any mistakes. This was originally a request.
creator: Shizu1243
